articles.title: New mural brings fresh life to the corner of Doyle’s and the Midway Cafe
articles.description:
Inspired by Anthony Bourdain's visit with Barack Obama a decade ago in Vietnam, the artwork aims to revive a landmark corner that changed after Doyle's closed in 2019.

The post New mural brings fresh life to the corner of Doyle’s and the Midway Cafe appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: New mural revitalizes the corner of Doyle's and Midway Cafe, enhancing local culture.
Inspired by Anthony Bourdain's 2016 visit with Barack Obama in Vietnam.
Revival aims to boost community engagement after Doyle's closure in 2019.

articles.title: Largest known bottlenose dolphin stranding hits Cape Cod
articles.description:
As many as 30 dolphins became stranded during low tide in Brewster. Most were able to return to the water, but several died.

The post Largest known bottlenose dolphin stranding hits Cape Cod appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: As many as 30 bottlenose dolphins stranded in Brewster during low tide.
Most dolphins returned to water, but several died in the incident.
Local wildlife officials emphasize the need for better stranding response measures.

summary: Visitors at Sail Boston are connecting with vessels linked to their heritage.

The event fosters community pride and historical appreciation among Boston residents.

articles.title: Boston rents are down again. See how much the average apartment now costs.
articles.description:
Average rent in the city now stands at $2,930, down from $3,054 a year earlier.

The post Boston rents are down again. See how much the average apartment now costs. appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Average rent in Boston decreased to $2,930 from $3,054 over the past year.

Residents may benefit from more affordable housing options in the city.

articles.title: Mass. teen injured jumping off 64-foot N.H. waterfall
articles.description:
The teen reportedly landed on some rocks.

summary: Massachusetts teen injured after jumping off 64-foot waterfall in New Hampshire.

articles.title: Man allegedly damages ‘several’ cars with wooden stick and cinder block in East Boston
articles.description:
The 27-year-old Roxbury man was arrested Sunday.

summary: A 27-year-old man was arrested for damaging multiple cars in East Boston.
